Release notes detailing new features and bug fixes for the Pebble firmware.

# Purpose
This document provides a summary of updates and bug fixes for a software release. The "What's New" section highlights new features, such as the backlight activation when a charger connects and upcoming enhancements for watchapp developers with the new PebbleKit. The "Bug Fixes" section lists resolved issues, including improvements to notification display, motion backlight functionality, and factory reset operations. It also addresses graphical rendering issues, ensuring correct behavior for drawing operations and compositing modes. These updates aim to enhance the software's functionality and user experience.
